messages: You are the most wonderful thing that has ever happened to me. Because of you, I finally feel truly loved after so many years ❤️
You bring out the passionate side of me. I completely lose myself when I look into your eyes, and it feels like heaven every time our bodies touch ❤️
The way you hold me, kiss me, and pull me close makes my heart race in ways I never thought possible 🥹
With you, every moment feels intense, beautiful, and unforgettable ❤️
You make me feel desired, loved, and alive all at once, and I never want to stop feeling this way with you ❤️
I love to sleep with you, hold you close from behind, kiss your neck, and feel your warm body against mine ❤️
I love it when you call me daddy, it drives me crazy in the best way 😈
You're actually really good at Table Tennis. I love playing with you… I’ve always dreamed of playing with my girlfriend 🏓❤️
Baby, I love it when you cook for me… I really, really love it ❤️
The chicken you make is so tasty 😋
Thank you for all the massages that you give me ❤️
